title: EULA ~2026 Human Creativity Report~
description:
A world where one click produces art that would have taken a week.

EULA is a visual novel that asks what【 drawing 】, what 【 creation 】, means in this age of AI. 

 

 
◆ Core System ◆During play, you can switch between the two modes, Organic/AI, at any time.

By pressing the Tab key or using the mode-switch button, you can see for yourself how the story changes between Organic and AI.

To explain this accurately, I am checking the official settings.

…Please wait a moment.

Ah. Found it.

It says...

What perspective you look from, how far you accept things, and what you ultimately agree to.

Just as different people can have different opinions about the same event,

the story also appears from different perspectives depending on the mode.

Can an image generated by AI have meaning?

What makes a picture drawn by a human different?

You can keep to one method until the very end, or you can reconsider your thoughts.

The end.

You seem a little worried.

Wakarimasu.

It is all right. There will be enough time to reflect on your own perspective on the AI debate.

Even if you do not have any particular opinion on the AI debate, you should at least be able to observe the noble activities of beautiful girls among themselves.

Please believe me. I am only telling the truth.
 

◆ Story ◆

The year is 2026. A world almost no different from reality.

You are an unknown illustrator~

Your wrist hurts, and the pictures you post do not get any reaction at all.

Then a friend recommends the AI image-generation service 【 HumbleAI 】 to you.

Look, the Terms of Use are displayed on the screen, right?

Hurry up and click Agree~! Who reads this stuff anyway?

Can you really agree to this?Of course you are going to agre—

Surely you are not about to agree without even reading what the terms are, are you?

What are you agreeing to?

What are you giving up?

That is right. It is not an easy question.

Fortunately, you are not alone.

Because we will help you! / We’ll help you~

Now, now. Let us leave the debate there.

For the details, we recommend experiencing them yourself by playing the game.

◆ Included Elements ◆• A mode-switching system that lets you experience the same scene in different ways

• A multi-ending structure that changes depending on Organic/AI mode

• A documentary dealing with theories of creation in the AI era of 2026

• Organic human-made illustrations, script, BGM, and a cappella

• Script using LLMs, 2D images using Diffusion, and waveform sound

• Game progression using an End User License Agreement that nobody reads

• A very small banana

• Aluminum foil tape with excellent adhesive strength

• A giraffe that failed to escape from the zoo

• Just a giraffe

• Giraffe…?

• Photos of energy drink cans the developers drank while pulling all-nighters

◆ Not Included ◆• Choices that force the player to act against their beliefs

• Reflections on ontological concerns

• A three-month free trial coupon for HumbleAI

• A giraffe picture drawn by me

• A date with the ultimate beautiful-girl 3.0+1.0 group

• An angel and devil inside your head

• A fan signing event with the game developers
※Please inquire separately if necessary

• A giant monster?

• A cat
description_short: An image created by AI — is it yours? An AI art tool is placed before a nameless illustrator. To accept, or to refuse. A visual novel that tells the same story in different forms. Your choices shape the ending - there is no right answer.
